vibe: Late-night Tokyo drift. City pop nostalgia meets deep house warmth, jazzy bass, and ambient percussion.

tracks.name: Ordinary Pleasure
tracks.reason: Funky synth-pop adjacent to the city pop and electronic grooves in rotation

tracks.name: People Everywhere (Still Alive)
tracks.reason: Psychedelic Thai funk — bridges the gap between Marcos Valle's warmth and Nujabes' groove

tracks.name: Love Song Of Urfa
tracks.reason: Meditative Japanese percussion — complements the 加藤有紀 and Ryuichi Sakamoto in listening history

tracks.name: Ylang Ylang
tracks.reason: Live-looped jazz-electronic bliss — same lane as Yussef Dayes and Floating Points

tracks.name: Maluco
tracks.reason: Brazilian bass and baile funk — extends the Marcos Valle and Azymuth thread

tracks.name: Why Like This?
tracks.reason: Abstract Brainfeeder beats — same world as Nujabes and re:plus but more textural

tracks.name: In Your Eyes
tracks.reason: Jazz-soul crossover with Charlotte Day Wilson — adjacent to Alfa Mist and Yussef Dayes

tracks.name: ノスタルジア・オブ・アイランド
tracks.reason: The king of city pop — natural next step from Momoko Kikuchi and Taeko Onuki

tracks.name: Funny Thing
tracks.reason: Bass-heavy funk jazz — connects the Moodymann groove with Sade's smoothness

tracks.name: Firefly
tracks.reason: Dreamy electronic with Nao's vocals — bridges KAYTRANADA's bounce with Mall Grab's warmth
